PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?film ?filmLabel(COUNT(?award) AS ?totalAwards) WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; wdt:P57 wd:Q43203 ; rdfs:label ?filmLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?filmLabel) , "en"))
  ?film wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?awardLabel) , "en"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel) , "academy") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel) , "bafta"))
}
GROUP BY ?film ?filmLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalAwards)
LIMIT 1
